What is stomach cancer?
- 
Stomach cancer
Contents 
What is stomach cancer? 
Symptoms 
Causes 
Tests and next steps 
Treatment 
Help and support 
Credit: NHS.UK
Stomach cancer is cancer that’s found anywhere in the stomach. The stomach is part of the digestive system. It helps you digest food. How serious stomach cancer is depends on how big the cancer is, if it has spread, and your general health. Stomach cancer is not very common in the UK. 
Important: 
Get your symptoms checked
It’s important to get any symptoms of stomach cancer checked as soon as possible.
Page last reviewed: 14 February 2023
Next review due: 14 February 2026
